RIC-64; RSC-121. Obverse: Laureate head right; Reverse: Jupiter seated left on throne, holding thunderbolt and scepter.

From the Connecticut Collection. 

Ex: Classical Numismatic Group 39 (9/1996) Lot # 1306.
